positive: A majestic, stylized forest scene with floating glowing lanterns and gentle nebula clouds. The central subject is a stylized, intricate silhouette of a majestic deer and a small, cozy house nestled among towering, bioluminescent trees. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with modern kawaii aesthetics, featuring clean lines, deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst), and gold foil accents. The composition must be symmetrical and highly decorative, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Emphasize strong contrast between the deep forest background and the luminous elements. Studio lighting, high detail, perfect symmetry, print-ready digital illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, realistic photo, jpeg compression, grimy, busy background, low contrast, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
